Desktop installers for Windows, Linux, and macOS.

## Fixes
- Windows state files now save reliably after the first write
- Download again no longer deletes completed torrent data
- Search sidecar always starts as an app-owned process on a free port
- Cached `.torrent` metadata is restored for resume and reseed

## Desktop
- Open download folder from Downloads, History, and Seeding
- Copy magnet link from search details
